name: com.motawea.cad-importer
description: Import CAD models (STL, PLY, OBJ, glTF/GLB, STEP, IGES) into Unity for robotics simulation and digital twins. Automatic unit and axis conversion, vertex welding, LOD generation, simplified physics colliders, metallic-roughness PBR materials, and an async runtime import API.

samples.description: Demo scene with the runtime import panel (DemoCadRuntimeImporter), reflective showcase materials and lighting. Requires the Universal Render Pipeline.
